name: Arcjet
description: An MCP server for Arcjet - the runtime security platform that ships with your AI code.
longDescription: Arcjet security MCP server for application protection. Manage teams, sites, security rules, analyze traffic, detect anomalies, investigate IPs, and get security briefings. Includes rate limiting, bot protection, and threat detection.
author: com.arcjet
examplePrompts: Show me my Arcjet teams and sites
Analyze traffic patterns for the last 24 hours
Explain why this request was denied
Get a security briefing for my application
